name: Palkia
description: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology. Its breath stabilizes the dimensions.
originLore: Palkia unfolded the void into traversable space. Its breath is said to stabilize dimensional folds so stars can hold their orbits without tearing the grid.

lore.celestialConcordance: Palkia's breath stretches the lattice of space until distant worlds become reachable coordinates.

quantumResonators.name: Spacial Rend
quantumResonators.description: Cuts a corridor through folded dimensions.

quantumResonators.name: Pearl Horizon
quantumResonators.description: Anchors volume so reality does not collapse inward.
